action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 training completed 5000 steps (~40 min) but the training curve image is empty, suggesting metrics.jsonl may not have been parsed or written correctly. The eval from iteration 4 (250 steps) returned 3.33% success, confirming the pipeline works but needs much more training. We have 8.56h left and 24 iterations. Before committing to a long training run, I need to verify (1) predict.py action bridge code is complete, (2) metrics were actually logged, and (3) how VLABench consumes ee actions. I will run a quick inspection command for these, and simultaneously submit eval for the 5000-step checkpoint to measure improvement and keep the eval pipeline moving.
action.command: echo '=== predict.py tail ===' && tail -n 80 /workspace/predict.py && echo '' && echo '=== iter_4 metrics ===' && wc -l /workspace/logs/iter_4/metrics.jsonl && head -n 3 /workspace/logs/iter_4/metrics.jsonl && echo '---' && tail -n 5 /workspace/logs/iter_4/metrics.jsonl && echo '' && echo '=== iter_6 metrics ===' && wc -l /workspace/logs/iter_6/metrics.jsonl && head -n 3 /workspace/logs/iter_6/metrics.jsonl && echo '---' && tail -n 10 /workspace/logs/iter_6/metrics.jsonl && echo '' && echo '=== VLABench ee_state references ===' && grep -r 'ee_state' /opt/VLABench/envs/ | grep -v '.pyc' | head -15 && echo '' && echo '=== Evaluator agent.predict handling ===' && grep -B 2 -A 25 'agent.predict' /opt/VLABench/evaluation/evaluator/base.py

command_output.stderr: grep: /opt/VLABench/envs/: No such file or directory
